headline: Nike Hoped to Score With the World Cup. It Got a Red Card Instead.
summary: Nike has had bad World Cup luck: The powerful teams it provides gear to didn’t make the final. But it also ran out of Team USA jerseys at the wrong time.

raw.headline: Nike Hoped to Score With the World Cup. It Got a Red Card Instead.
raw.summary: Nike has had bad World Cup luck: The powerful teams it provides gear to didn’t make the final. But it also ran out of Team USA jerseys at the wrong time.

headline: Giant athletic shoe company retail chain closes locations
summary: Nike's restructuring, which it launched in April 2026, has already led to several store closings, layoffs, and an exit from a business partnership. And now the popular sneaker company has closed two more locations on opposite sides of the country as part of its national retail strategy, according ...
